body.title: Implement Reciprocal Rank Fusion in memory_search combining FTS and semantic signals
body.result: RRF fusion added to memory_search: _rrf_merge() + _fts_search(); holistic + FTS signals combined; falls back gracefully; 21 tests all green
body.description:
Current memory_search uses FTS index only. Semantic similarity and exact-match relevance are complementary signals: FTS excels at known terms, semantic at concept similarity. RRF (Reciprocal Rank Fusion) combines both by computing sum(1/(k + rank_i)) for each signal's rank — no threshold tuning required. Based on hybrid memory agent research (URL 4) and context architecture pull model (URL 16: freshness and cost apply to retrieval).

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/memory_search.py, tests/test_memory_search.py
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/database (Postgres; pg_trgm or separate embedding table for semantic signal)
**Scope boundary:** In scope: add semantic retrieval path, combine with FTS via RRF, return merged ranked results, backward-compatible API. Out of scope: changing the memory_search function signature.
**Test plan:** Query containing both exact match and semantically-related term; verify RRF ranks combined match higher than either signal alone. Verify known-keyword queries are not degraded vs current FTS behavior.
